title: Auto-numbering with ir.sequence (gap-aware, per-company, date-ranged)
reuse_advice: self.env['ir.sequence'].next_by_code('your.code'); with_company() for per-company, use_date_range for per-period counters. Never compute max(x)+1 in create().

title: Periodic background jobs with ir.cron (Scheduled Actions)
intents: tự động xử lý định kỳ
reuse_advice: Define an ir.cron data record calling one clean method (state='code'); set interval + numbercall=-1. Don't write a custom daemon/loop/external poller.

title: Declarative event reactions with Automation Rules (base.automation)
reuse_advice: Configure an Automation Rule (on create/update/deletion/time/webhook) linked to a server action. Don't override write() just to fire a side-effect.
when_not_enough: complex ordered, unit-tested business logic — then a small method called from a server action

title: Derived values with a computed field (@api.depends), not onchange
reuse_advice: Use a computed field with @api.depends (store=True if queried/grouped). @api.onchange fires ONLY in the form view — never put business logic there or in write().
when_not_enough: a value that is a side-effect, not derived — that belongs in a flow hook

title: Mirror a value from a related record with related=
intents: lấy giá trị từ bản ghi liên kết
hiển thị trường của đối tác
reuse_advice: Use a related='a.b.c' field to mirror one-way; don't duplicate-and-sync in write(). Add store=True only if you filter/group on it.
when_not_enough: the value must diverge from the source after creation

title: Change history / audit log via mail.thread field tracking
reuse_advice: Inherit mail.thread and set tracking=True on the fields to log; changes post to the chatter automatically. Don't build a custom audit/history model.
when_not_enough: a legally distinct, immutable ledger with its own retention rules

title: Reminders / follow-ups / to-dos via mail.activity
reuse_advice: Inherit mail.activity.mixin and call record.activity_schedule(type, user_id=, date_deadline=). Don't build a custom reminder/task model.
when_not_enough: a domain-specific scheduling engine with its own SLA logic

title: Toggle behavior via a Settings feature group (res.config.settings)
reuse_advice: Many native features are simply OFF until a setting is enabled — check Settings before assuming a feature is missing. Add a group_* boolean (implied_group) rather than hardcoding a feature check.

title: Row-level access with record rules (ir.rule), not a read() filter
intents: giới hạn bản ghi nhìn thấy
reuse_advice: Define an ir.rule (domain; additive group rules vs subtractive global). Don't override read()/search() to filter rows. Verify with `odoo-ai security <model> --user`.
when_not_enough: row visibility that depends on runtime state no domain can express

title: PDF/HTML documents via a QWeb report (ir.actions.report)
reuse_advice: Define an ir.actions.report linking a QWeb template + paperformat; extend an existing report by inheriting its template and/or overriding _get_report_values. Don't hand-roll PDF generation.
when_not_enough: pixel-exact legal forms better served by a fillable-PDF library
